name: web-search
description: Search the web using DuckDuckGo and return formatted results with titles, URLs, and snippets
author: OrionOmega

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web for information. Returns titles, URLs, and snippets.

count.description: Number of results to return (1-20, default 5)

default_count.label: Default Result Count
default_count.description: Number of search results to return when count is not specified (1-20)

max_chars.label: Max Characters per Snippet
max_chars.description: Maximum characters to return per search result snippet

user_agent.label: User Agent
user_agent.description: Custom User-Agent header for web requests
